prompt:
Use case: identity-preserve
Asset type: runtime tactics unit sprite faction rework
Primary request: rework this approved Children of Prophecy Aevum Guardian so it matches the newly approved enlightened monk faction palette used by the reworked Mirage Seer while preserving the guardian's exact identity
Subject: preserve the exact Aevum Guardian identity and silhouette from the input image, including the broad conical hat, wrapped face, bare chest, lean ascetic body, rust-sash placement, trousers, simple staff weapon, grounded stance, and transparent background
Style/medium: preserve the same painterly pixel-art-inspired tactics sprite finish, moderate pixelation level, readable broad shapes, and runtime-game clarity as the input image
Composition/framing: preserve the same full-body crop, stance, orientation, and tight sprite bounds
Lighting/mood: solemn, sacred, desert-dusk atmosphere with restrained contrast and a subtle enlightened presence rather than military severity
Color palette: match the faction direction established by the approved reworked Mirage Seer reference image: sun-faded saffron yellow, muted moss green, temple gold, pale sand cloth, and tiny jade-teal accents; shift away from Order-adjacent rust red and bone-white dominance while keeping the figure warm, spiritual, and distinct from crusader red-and-white troops
Materials/textures: wrapped cloth, pilgrim fabric, lightly worn leather, humble ritual fittings, simple wood staff
Constraints: preserve the Aevum Guardian silhouette, broad hat, exposed chest, staff read, anatomy, and sprite finish; do not cover the torso with armor or heavy robes; keep the role martial but ascetic and monk-like, not knightly; exactly one subject; no floor; no scenery; no text; no extra subjects; alpha only outside the outer silhouette; avoid oversized transparent padding
Avoid: Order colors, dark wine red, crusader white-red contrast, plated knight cues, sci-fi cues, glossy rendering, anime rendering, noisy micro-detail, soft blur, cinematic background
